title: Flaky Saudi Arabian Pasta Casserole
description: A sour and crumbly Saudi Arabian dish featuring graham cracker crumbs and pasta water emulsion, perfect for a sick day. It is a comforting and easy to make meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the pasta according to package instructions and reserve 1 cup of pasta water.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, sour cream, and zaatar, if using.
In a separate bowl, mix the graham cracker crumbs and melted butter until well combined.
Add the pasta water to the pasta mixture and stir until a smooth emulsion forms.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the pasta mixture.
Top the pasta layer with a layer of the graham cracker crumb mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of graham cracker crumbs on top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
